exchanges.exchange-shape: Proposal, caution rejected, challenge to bond, bond reaffirmed twice over.
exchanges.structure: Opens with action proposal. Long cautionary counter. Brief mockery dismisses caution. Final two beats are intimate affirmations trading the same phrase back.
rhetorical-dna: Three-way dynamic collapses to dyad: the cautious leader yields to beloved companion
Contrast between formal warning speech and clipped affectionate exchange
Subtext: old friends who cannot refuse each other, dressed as strategic disagreement
No interstitial action; pure voice exchange until final tender repetition
exchanges.respecification-seed: Trusted companions disagree on risk; the bond overrides prudence.

exchanges.exchange-shape: Accusation, full confession, contempt, sword-offering, loaded silence, wordless mercy.
exchanges.structure: Opens mid-accusation with long confessional monologue. Accuser's contempt is brief and cutting. Accused pushes sword across table, invites death. Long silent beat. Accuser drinks, waits, finally offers shelter in few words.
rhetorical-dna: Power inverts: accused seizes moral high ground through vulnerability
Extreme contrast: ornate confessional outpouring vs. terse contemptuous dismissal
Subtext: neither truly wants the rupture; the sword-push is a dare to break the bond
Interstitials carry weight: the unmoved accuser, the drinking, the heavy rising
exchanges.respecification-seed: Loyalty questioned; the accused strips bare; silence becomes pardon.

exchanges.exchange-shape: Demand, riddling deflection, sharper demand, riddling yield, surprise at identity, announcement of defection, accusation, apology, truth.
exchanges.structure: Opens with clipped interrogative. Respondent answers in cryptic abstractions. Questioner presses twice. Identity revelation pivots tone. Final beats shift from suspicion to regret to plain statement.
rhetorical-dna: Pursuer holds physical power; evader holds informational power through riddles
Sharp contrast: interrogator's short imperatives vs. respondent's layered, evasive poetry
Subtext: the defector tests reception before committing; the lady's tone softens as guilt enters
Minimal interstitial; exchange is almost pure dialogue with single action beat (recognition)
exchanges.respecification-seed: Authority demands answers; the stranger reveals allegiance shift through riddles.
